name: click-sdd
description: Click Seguros SDD workflow plugin for Claude Code.

orchestration_profile.title: Orchestration profile
orchestration_profile.description: Named preset for all 18 per-phase models at once (balanced, cost-saver, quality, or custom for a hand-tuned selection).

explore_model.title: Explore model
explore_model.description: Model alias for the explore phase (investigates a topic, reads the codebase, compares approaches; no files created).

propose_model.title: Propose model
propose_model.description: Model alias for the propose phase (drafts scope, approach, risks, and rollback plan).

spec_model.title: Spec model
spec_model.description: Model alias for the spec phase (writes acceptance-criteria scenarios from the proposal).

design_model.title: Design model
design_model.description: Model alias for the design phase (architecture and technical decisions from the proposal).

tasks_model.title: Tasks model
tasks_model.description: Model alias for the tasks phase (breaks spec and design into an ordered, implementable task list).

apply_model.title: Apply model
apply_model.description: Model alias for the apply phase (implements tasks against specs and design).

verify_model.title: Verify model
verify_model.description: Model alias for the verify phase (validates the implementation against specs and reports findings).

archive_model.title: Archive model
archive_model.description: Model alias for the archive phase (closes a change and persists final state).

onboard_model.title: Onboard model
onboard_model.description: Model alias for the onboard phase (guided, pedagogical walkthrough of the SDD workflow).

jd_judge_a_model.title: Judgment Day judge A model
jd_judge_a_model.description: Model alias for Judgment Day's blind judge A (adversarial review).

jd_judge_b_model.title: Judgment Day judge B model
jd_judge_b_model.description: Model alias for Judgment Day's blind judge B (adversarial review).

jd_fix_agent_model.title: Judgment Day fix agent model
jd_fix_agent_model.description: Model alias for Judgment Day's fix agent (applies surgical fixes from confirmed issues).

review_risk_model.title: Review risk model
review_risk_model.description: Model alias for the review-risk lens role.

review_readability_model.title: Review readability model
review_readability_model.description: Model alias for the review-readability lens role.

review_reliability_model.title: Review reliability model
review_reliability_model.description: Model alias for the review-reliability lens role.

review_resilience_model.title: Review resilience model
review_resilience_model.description: Model alias for the review-resilience lens role.

review_refuter_model.title: Review refuter model
review_refuter_model.description: Model alias for the review-refuter role.

default_model.title: Default model
default_model.description: Model alias used as the fallback for any delegation not covered by a specific phase.
